title: Wrathy Armament
description: Mod of weapons from game-world-wide galaxies "to give opportunities for Steve to try them"
body:
![Title](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e706294b-260a-4376-a5b8-063f6d64d612.png)

About:

Wrathy Armament - legendary weapons bringing Minecraft mod for Forge(NeoForge and Fabric upcoming),
oriented to provide weapons from game-world-wide galaxies "to give opportunities for Steve to try them".

Each weapon's  system of getting and abilities created according to its originals in games they're from. Some from slaying bosses, some from crafting or finding.
Mod's weapons contain sparkle-tier upgrading system, that improves and unlock new abilities. So try them in use!

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1dbfcbc7-2ad9-497c-a4b5-4f915815a3f3.png)

🟢 Project Status: 
- Ongoing (In active development in general, but on small break)


📝Current plans for versions:

- Port and support 1.20.1 for Fabric

📖 DEPENDENCIES:

Wrathy Armament requires: 

- AniTexLib 0.4+: [anitexlib](https://modrinth.com/mod/anitexlib)
  
- PlayerAnimator: [playeranimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
  
- Better Combat: [better-combat-by-daedelus](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1dbfcbc7-2ad9-497c-a4b5-4f915815a3f3.png)


Special Thanks:

-Thanks LCC Community, and its modjam of 2023, that gave impact to create and continue development of it
